message:
refactor(stream): migrate any_all, chunks, and fold combinators from manual Unpin to pin-project

Continue the stream combinator pin-projection migration (following
d774d392) for three more combinators that still used manual Unpin impls
and Pin::new(&mut self.stream) patterns.

- Any/All (any_all.rs): Add #[pin] stream, remove manual Unpin impls,
  project in poll(), remove S: Unpin bound from Future impls.

- Chunks/ReadyChunks (chunks.rs): Add #[pin] stream to both types,
  remove manual Unpin impls, project in poll_next(), dereference
  projected cap/items fields via *this.cap and std::mem::take(this.items).
  Add collect_chunks() test helper for synchronous stream draining.

- Fold (fold.rs): Add #[pin] stream, remove manual Unpin impl, project
  in poll(), use this.acc.take() and *this.acc = Some(...) for projected
  Option access.

All three now compose with !Unpin streams without requiring boxing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
